title: Why Elon Musk has called Claude AI chatbot 'woke'
description: Elon Musk has taken a dig at Anthropic's AI chatbot, Claude, calling it "woke" and mocking the company's logo.

title: Women hold 31% of new AI jobs in India: Report
description: Women account for 31% of new roles created by artificial intelligence (AI) and emerging technologies in India, according to data from hiring firms.

title: Who is Charlie Puth, and why has an AI platform Moises hired him? Singer joins Moises as chief music officer to guide AI music tools
description: Who is Charlie Puth, and why has an AI platform Moises hired him? The singer has joined Moises as chief music officer. He will guide product and creative direction. The move highlights growing links between musicians and AI tools used for music creation, remixing, and experimentation across the industry.

title: The OpenAI IPO Could Be the Biggest AI IPO Ever
description: InvestorPlace - Stock Market News, Stock Advice & Trading TipsA wave of AI IPOs – from OpenAI to Anduril – could soon give investors access to the companies building artificial intelligence.The post The OpenAI IPO Could Be the Biggest AI IPO Ever appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Elon Musk's Grok AI creates sick posts mocking Liverpool and tragic star Diogo Jota
description: SENSITIVE CONTENT: Sick social media users have found a way to make AI software Grok create twisted and offensive messages to football fans as Liverpool supporters and Diogo Jota were targeted
